meaning: n.鐭宠啅,鐏版偿,鑶忚嵂,姗＄毊鑶弙t.娑備互鐏版偿,鏁蜂互鑶忚嵂,鍑忚交,绮樿创,閲嶅垱
examples: One of the kids was peeling plaster off the wall.
First, you need to strip away all the old plaster.
The plaster had started to come away from the wall.
Looking up, he watched lines of icicles forming where water sluiced through cracks in the plaster.
To protect themselves, producers of consumer goods plaster their packages with warnings about every conceivable mishap.
